description: A Platform Security Engineer applied strict Pod Security Standards to the 'secure-db' PostgreSQL deployment in the 'finance' namespace, which is now in a CrashLoopBackOff state. Diagnose and resolve the underlying issues to bring the deployment to a Running and Ready state. You must maintain the mandated security constraints, specifically preserving readOnlyRootFilesystem, runAsUser: 999, and the TLS certificate configuration. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
